title: ezosciadium capense
intro: Ezosciadium capense, also known as Cape marigold or Aztec marigold, is a plant species belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Ezosciadium capense include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and decoctions, are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
